rationale: Subject home is identified within the orange dashed bounding box centered at approximately (530, 625) in image pixel coordinates. The bounding box spans roughly 261 × 268 pixels (55.3 ft × 56.8 ft), yielding a bounding box area of ~3,146 sq ft. The roof consists of two attached sections: (1) an upper darker-shingled complex hip roof section forming the main house body, and (2) a lower lighter-toned flat or low-slope section (likely garage or addition). The structure appears to be under active construction with lumber staging visible around it. The roof polygon was traced as a roughly rectangular shape (~230 × 250 px) oriented slightly off-axis, filling approximately 83% of the bounding box, yielding ~2,600 sq ft footprint. Ridge lines are short due to a nearly square plan. Six hip lines were identified at the corners and bump-out transitions. Two valley intersections were counted where roof planes meet inward. Rake edges are minimal (mostly hip roof). Eave lines trace the lower perimeter of both roof sections. Confidence is reduced due to ongoing construction obscuring some edge definitions and uncertainty over the flat-roof section's final pitch.
